creator: changlp@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
New patch here:
http://people.cs.nctu.edu.tw/~changlp/ports/www/gist/gist-3.1.0_3.patch

- Add a patch backporting certificate extracted from git repository (3aacc1=
fbb)
- Add an option for choosing whether to use security/ca_root_nss
- Remove ruby build dependency

--
Lung-Pin Chang =E5=BC=B5=E7=93=8F=E7=B9=BD
